rawContent: Task: 260409-221218 | Outcome: completed | Observation: Task 260409-221218 (Add dark mode toggle to header component) completed all 7 pipeline stages with 0 retries each (~394s duration, full mode). Verify stage reported FAIL with date formatting test failures ('expected 1/15/2024, 12:30 PM to contain 10', 'expected 1/1/2100 to contain 2099') and lint errors (setState synchronously within effect, module variable assignment). Ship stage correctly reported 'skipped — local mode, no issue number', avoiding accidental shipment. However, this skip is coincidental and does not fix the structural defect — verify FAIL continues to not block progression to ship in non-local-mode runs. | Pattern: This is the sixteenth consecutive run (832, 841, 260409-111824, 840, 842, 844, two 419-reruns, 847, 846, 858, 863, 874, 260409-215133, 260409-220738, and now 260409-221218) exhibiting the identical verify-to-ship gate flaw: verify stage reports FAIL due to test failures or lint errors, yet the pipeline proceeds through review-fix to ship. Fifteen prior retrospectives recommended implementing a verifyExitCode conditional gate in the ship stage template. The ship stage skip due to local mode is correct behavior but is coincidental — it does not resolve the structural lack of a blocking mechanism at the verify-to-ship boundary. | Suggestion: This pattern has now been documented 16 consecutive times across two days without implementation of the recommended fix. Escalate beyond a recommendation: create a P0 bug ticket tagged 'pipeline-gate-flaw' with label 'urgent' to add a verifyExitCode check in the ship stage template that halts pipeline execution when verify reports FAIL. The ship stage template configuration change is a one-line addition that prevents this entire class of silent quality failures from reaching shipped code. | Flaw: verify → ship gate — Verify stage FAIL does not prevent pipeline progression to ship. The pipeline lacks a blocking mechanism at the verify-to-ship boundary. | Stages: taskify:completed, plan:completed, build:completed, verify:completed, review:completed, review-fix:completed, ship:completed
